stages.content: Workflow wiring done: memory pack filled (check OK), learnings seeded (9 entries), traces enabled, bmad.config.yaml (6 context tags OK), CLAUDE.md with activation block, boot.json receipt (profile game, size small, partial adoption - no pack install)

Rules addendum drafted: 10 ruling groups (R0-R10), 20 KAN-2 acceptance criteria. PROVISIONAL taste calls flagged for morning: miss/dodge model, cap numbers, Burn-Shock cost, RPM numbers, grapple gates, requirements-halving, token-exchange cut

Seed data completed and validated (validate_seeds.py green, 31 rows). Real campaign enemies ported incl. 6-phase Incinedile. Learning: no Godot 4 binary obtainable in this container (proxy 403s GitHub releases + godotengine hosts; apt has only godot3) - GDScript tests must run on owner machine/CI; gdparse (gdtoolkit) is the honest in-container syntax gate

Campaign content ported: 44 skills/82 thresholds/28 items/100 tags/27 modifiers, validator green 141 rows, verified independently. Flags: Camouflage 3rd stat dropped (schema), Fedora Psy kept raw, tag descriptions empty in export (live in docx)

task: Overnight groundwork: workflow wiring, rules addendum, seed data, KAN-2 engine
